professor.title: 教授 Professor
professor.biography_text: 于 2003 年在清华大学计算机系获得博士学位 Dr./Prof. Zhao Qingjie received the Ph.D. degree in computer science and technology of Tsinghua University, in 2003. 从 2003 年至今，在北京理工大学计算机学院工作。其中，2008-2009，在英国 Essex 大学客座访问。 From 2003- now, Dr./Prof. Zhao Qingjie has been working in the School of Computer Science and Technology, Beijing Institute of Technology, China. From 2008 to 2009, she was a Visiting Fellow in the School of Computer Science and Electronic Engineering, University of Essex, U.K.
